narrative.description: Turn-based RPGs alternate between overworld exploration and menu-driven party combat. Stat growth, equipment, and ability unlocks compound over a long campaign.
narrative.core_loop: Explore overworld and dungeons, trigger turn-based battles, earn experience and loot, manage party loadouts at towns, and advance story through boss gates.

mechanics.map_notes: Party members act in turns selecting skills and targets.
mechanics.expression: Party members act in turns selecting skills and targets.

mechanics.map_notes: Level-ups and stat curves define long-term power growth.
mechanics.expression: Level-ups and stat curves define long-term power growth.

mechanics.map_notes: World map or hub connects towns, dungeons, and story beats.
mechanics.expression: World map or hub connects towns, dungeons, and story beats.

mechanics.map_notes: Weapons, armor, and accessories customize party roles.
mechanics.expression: Weapons, armor, and accessories customize party roles.

mechanics.map_notes: Random or visible encounters populate dungeons and overworld.
mechanics.expression: Random or visible encounters populate dungeons and overworld.

mechanics.map_notes: Shops convert currency into gear and consumables.
mechanics.expression: Shops convert currency into gear and consumables.

mechanics.map_notes: Story bosses gate new regions or abilities.
mechanics.expression: Story bosses gate new regions or abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Late-game bosses introduce phase shifts and new abilities.
mechanics.expression: Late-game bosses introduce phase shifts and new abilities.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Turn-Based RPG through its core rpg loop.
